name: Stationary Turret
description: A fixed turret that detects the player within range and fires at a set interval. Uses timer-based distance checks on Tick and a firing custom event. Prints damage messages. No AI controller needed.
blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_Turret}}
PARENT: Actor

VAR PlayerInRange: Bool = false

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Turret Online"]
NODE n3: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="CheckRange", Time=0.5, Looping=true]
NODE n4: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="Fire", Time={{fire_interval|2.0}}, Looping=true]
NODE n5: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="CheckRange"]
NODE n6: GetPlayerPawn
NODE n7: GetDistanceTo
NODE n8: LessEqual_FloatFloat [B={{detection_range|1000}}]
NODE n9: SetVar [Variable=PlayerInRange]
NODE n10: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="Fire"]
NODE n11: GetVar [Variable=PlayerInRange]
NODE n12: Branch
NODE n13: PrintString [InString="{{fire_message|Turret fires! -{{damage|10}} HP}}"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n9.Execute
EXEC n10.Then -> n12.Execute
EXEC n12.True -> n13.Execute

DATA n6.ReturnValue -> n7.OtherActor [Actor]
DATA n7.ReturnValue -> n8.A [Float]
DATA n8.ReturnValue -> n9.Value [Bool]
DATA n11.Value -> n12.Condition [Bool]

example_spawn.notes: Place on ground with clear line of sight to play area
